subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath set his face towards the Sanctuary of the Desired One and journeyed from his dwelling unto the Most Great House of Vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی قصد حرم المقصود و سافر من بیته الی بیت الاعظم منظر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
